nasb.text: Your sons shall be shepherds for forty years in the wilderness, and they will suffer for your unfaithfulness, until your corpses lie in the wilderness.

esv.text: And your children shall be shepherds in the wilderness forty years and shall suffer for your faithlessness, until the last of your dead bodies lies in the wilderness.

cnv.text: 你們的兒女必在曠野飄流四十年，擔當你們背信之罪，直到你們的屍體在曠野都滅盡了。

ccb.text: 你们的儿女要在旷野飘泊四十年，为你们的不忠而受苦，直到你们都死在旷野。
